title: DISTRICT COOLING SYSTEM (DCS) TECHNICIAN | CONSTRUCTION INDUSTRY | FACILITIES MAINTENANCE
description:
DISTRICT COOLING SYSTEM (DCS) Technicians
- Support the execution of Operations and Maintenance (O&M) activities for District Cooling Plants
- Participate in daily toolbox talks and work meetings conducted by Engineers and Supervisors
- Plan, schedule, execute, and oversee contractors for routine and non-routine O&M tasks and troubleshooting, as assigned
- Conduct daily plant walk-through inspections to ensure operational reliability.
- Maintain accurate maintenance records and ensure proper housekeeping of work areas and tools.
- Assist Engineers with the sourcing and procurement of spare parts.
- Promptly investigate, identify, and report any equipment defects, deficiencies, or abnormalities
- Monitor contractor performance and report on work quality, ensuring compliance with contractual and technical requirements
- Provide support for district cooling operations at other project locations after completing required training

Requirements :

- Higher NITEC / NITEC in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Plumbing/ Refrigeration from a recognized educational institute
- Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in Facility Management / Chiller Operation & Maintenance / Plant process management.
- Good analytical and communication skills with positive attitude 
- Experience in troubleshooting plant equipment and implementing preventive maintenance strategies.
- Knowledge of district cooling systems and chiller operations.
- Familiarity with safety regulations, risk assessments and ISO standards

730AM - 515PM, 5 Days rotation shift

Work location : based in Changi, will work at other locations whenever required

Visit our office anytime from Monday - Friday 1PM - 5PM
18 Boon Lay Way | #02-126 Tradehub 21 | Singapore 609966 or drop us an email with your CV at hr@equatorsearch.com
